title: Remove redundant 'Read specs/README.md' from verify.md embedded template
close_reason: Removed redundant 'Read specs/README.md' from verify.md template (both embedded at crates/springfield/templates/verify.md and local at .sgf/prompts/verify.md). This was redundant because MEMENTO.md already includes 'study @specs/README.md' and gets prepended to all assembled prompts.

title: Remove redundant 'Read specs/README.md' from test-plan.md embedded template
close_reason: Removed redundant 'Read specs/README.md' line from both crates/springfield/templates/test-plan.md and .sgf/prompts/test-plan.md to match the spec definition

title: Sync spec.md prompt template with spec: add 'Read the spec(s) that are involved in these changes as I mention them (if applicable)' line
close_reason: Added missing 'Read the spec(s) that are involved in these changes as I mention them (if applicable)' line to both crates/springfield/templates/spec.md and .sgf/prompts/spec.md to match the spec definition

title: Cargo build fails in sandbox: rustix build script panics on missing env var, linker errors
docker sandbox create rejects --template flag
close_reason: Fixed --template arg order: must precede the claude subcommand in docker sandbox create. Was silently failing (exit 125), causing sandbox to use default template without PN_DAEMON.

title: Build fails: libc 0.2.182 cfg freebsd12 panic with Rust 1.93
Update build.md template: use 'issue' terminology and simplify exit condition
Update pensa.md template: change description to 'exclusive work item (issue) tracker'
Update project .sgf/prompts/build.md and .sgf/PENSA.md to match spec changes
Verify template changes end-to-end: rebuild sgf, run sgf init --force, confirm templates match spec
Update pn ready query to include unplanned bugs
description: Change ready_issues() in db.rs to remove the hardcoded bug exclusion. Replace 'issue_type IN (task, test, chore)' with a condition that includes bugs only when they have zero non-closed fixes children: (issue_type \!= 'bug' OR id NOT IN (SELECT fixes FROM issues WHERE fixes IS NOT NULL AND status \!= 'closed')). See specs/pensa.md pn ready section. Source: crates/pensa/src/db.rs:560-606.

title: Update auto-close to all-or-nothing for multi-fix bugs
description: Change close_issue() in db.rs to check whether ALL issues with fixes pointing to the same bug are closed before auto-closing the bug. Currently (db.rs:312-327) the first fix task to close immediately closes the bug. New behavior: query 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE fixes = ?bug_id AND status \!= closed AND id \!= ?closing_task_id'. If count > 0, skip auto-close. If 0, auto-close with reason 'fixed' (not 'fixed by <task-id>' since multiple tasks may contribute). See specs/pensa.md fixes field description. Source: crates/pensa/src/db.rs:312-327.

title: Update existing fixes_auto_close and ready_excludes_bugs tests
description: Update the two existing tests in crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs and crates/pensa/src/db.rs that test the old behavior: (1) fixes_auto_close (integration.rs:176-205, db.rs:1591-1634) — should still pass since single-fix auto-close is unchanged, but verify the auto-close reason is now 'fixed' instead of 'fixed by <task-id>'. (2) ready_excludes_bugs (integration.rs:364-383) — invert the assertion: bugs should now APPEAR in pn ready when unplanned. Source: crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs, crates/pensa/src/db.rs unit tests.

title: Remove sgf issues plan command and issues-plan prompt template
description: Remove the 'sgf issues plan' CLI command from crates/springfield/. Remove the issues-plan.md embedded prompt template. Update the stage enum/dispatch if one exists. Remove the issues-plan stage from prompt assembly and loop orchestration. See specs/springfield.md — the command is removed, bug planning is handled inline by the build loop. Source: crates/springfield/ (search for 'issues.plan' or 'issues-plan' or 'IssuesPlan'). Also remove .sgf/prompts/issues-plan.md from the sgf init scaffold set.

title: Update embedded build.md prompt template with bug planning instructions
description: Update the build.md prompt template embedded in crates/springfield/ (and .sgf/prompts/build.md if it exists locally) to include bug planning instructions. When the claimed item is a bug, the agent should: study codebase, create fix task(s) with --fixes, comment on bug, release bug, commit with [bug-id] prefix. See specs/springfield.md build.md template section. Source: crates/springfield/templates/build.md (or wherever templates are embedded).

title: Update embedded PENSA.md template with bug planning workflow
description: Update the PENSA.md template embedded in crates/springfield/ (and .sgf/PENSA.md if it exists locally) to include the bug planning workflow section. Add 'Bug Planning' section between 'Logging Bugs' and 'Closing Work'. See specs/springfield.md PENSA template section. Source: crates/springfield/templates/PENSA.md (or wherever templates are embedded).

title: Add integration tests: unplanned bug in ready, planned bug excluded, type filter
description: Add new integration tests in crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs: (1) ready_includes_unplanned_bugs — create bug with no fix tasks, verify it appears in pn ready. (2) ready_excludes_planned_bugs — create bug, create fix task with --fixes, verify bug no longer in pn ready. (3) ready_type_filter_excludes_bugs — create bug, run pn ready -t task, verify bug excluded. See specs/pensa.md testing strategy section. Source: crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs.

title: Add integration test: multi-fix all-or-nothing auto-close
description: Add integration test in crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs: fixes_multi_fix_all_or_nothing — create bug, create two fix tasks with --fixes pointing to the bug, close first fix task, verify bug still open, close second fix task, verify bug auto-closed with reason 'fixed'. See specs/pensa.md testing strategy section. Source: crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs.

title: Add integration test: end-to-end bug planning workflow
description: Add integration test in crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs: bug_planning_e2e — simulate the full bug planning workflow from the CLI: create bug, verify it appears in pn ready, claim it, create fix task with --fixes, release bug, verify bug no longer in pn ready, claim fix task, close fix task, verify bug auto-closed. This validates the entire lifecycle end-to-end. Source: crates/pensa/tests/integration.rs.
